questions.q: According to a regulatory filing revealed in late April 2026, Warner Bros. Discovery CEO David Zaslav's compensation package more than tripled in 2025 to what amount?
questions.correctText: David Zaslav's 2025 total compensation surged to $165 million, largely due to a massive stock option award.

questions.q: In May 2026, subscribers filed a federal antitrust lawsuit seeking to block Paramount's acquisition deals involving Skydance and which other major studio?
questions.correctText: A class-action lawsuit was filed by subscribers aiming to halt the Paramount, Skydance, and Warner Bros. Discovery merger deals.

questions.q: Which actor was the center of a five-studio bidding war in late April 2026 to star in a feature film adaptation of the video game 'Battlefield'?
questions.correctText: Five studios submitted bids for a 'Battlefield' movie package starring Michael B. Jordan and directed by Christopher McQuarrie.

questions.q: In May 2026, director Pavel Talankin reported that an airline had lost his recently awarded Documentary Oscar for which film?
questions.correctText: Pavel Talankin stated that his Oscar statuette for 'Mr. Nobody Against Putin' went missing after the TSA forced him to check it in his luggage.

questions.q: Ben Leonberg, the director of 'Good Boy', was announced in April 2026 to be making 'Follow Mode', a new horror film focused on what piece of technology?
questions.correctText: Leonberg's 'Follow Mode' is a drone horror film where a consumer-grade drone's tracking setting turns deadly.
